calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: June Lee for Alvin Louie, Terry Louie and Lyndon Louie.

Ms. Lee stated that the report was filed on February 20th and that the civil action is finalized. The Court Clerk noted that the petition for final distribution has a hearing date of April 23, 2019. The Petition for Approval of Status Report of Administration of Estate is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Continued To Feb-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: June Lee for Alvin Louie and Terry Louie (Petitioners).

Ms. Lee stated that the elder abuse matter settled in December, that they anticipate withdrawing their elder abuse claim, that they will be finalizing the settlement in February and that she can file her petition in February. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to February 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Jan-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alan Silver appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court asked why this estate can't be closed. Mr. Silver stated that they have a petition on file, that they are working on settlement regarding an elder abuse claim against Lyndon Louie and that mediation in the civil matter is scheduled in November. Status on close of estate is continued to January 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To Apr-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the personal representative to appear on April 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed and the representative should not be suspended. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on March 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for close of estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone, S.Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
